name: @klad/docs

scripts.//playground: The embedded playground is a build artefact, not source: it is rebuilt for this site's base path on every docs build and gitignored. `pnpm --filter @klad/playground dev` is still the way to work on it.
scripts.//images: Regenerate the hero and link-preview PNGs after changing the scene. Checked in rather than built on deploy: a crawler needs the card at a stable URL, and rebuilding every time would churn a binary in git for no change.

//devDependencies: The playground is listed so turbo knows this package depends on it: the docs build rebuilds it for this site's base path, and without the edge a playground-only change would leave a stale docs build in the cache.
